The author uses ChatGPT with Claude (via DeepSeek) for cost efficiency, staying with DeepSeek despite primarily using ChatGPT.

title: Jack Altman on Product-Market Fit
content: Jack Altman discusses product-market fit, customer feedback, hiring, and fundraising on Speedrun, drawing from his experience scaling Lattice to a multi-billion-dollar company. He covers how founders should evaluate customer requests, recognize when to pivot, and balance conviction with market feedback. Topics include early-stage challenges like building a sales motion, hiring first employees, scaling tradeoffs, co-founder dynamics, startup momentum, and his current investment criteria at Alt Capital.

title: 3 年画了 50+ 张 drawio,我的判断:文字过誉了
content: After three years creating 50+ drawio diagrams, the author argues that two-dimensional diagrams offer double the information density of text for engineering problems. Drawio outperforms PowerPoint, which forces networked structures into linear slides, and Markdown/Mermaid, which sacrifices positional semantics to auto-layout. The tool's value lies not in final outputs but in the thinking process itself—diagramming acts as a logic detector, exposing flaws in complex systems. Key caveats: drawio creates cross-group communication friction, may weaken writing skills, and suits large evolving systems more than short-term or non-engineering projects.

title: 智谱的发条
content: Zhipu's stock surged 1,600% in five months since its January IPO at HK$116.2, driven by monthly catalysts: model releases (GLM-5, GLM-5.1, GLM-5.2), API price hikes, and strong earnings. However, the rally relies heavily on structural factors: only 4% free float, early passive fund inflows from Hang Seng Tech Index inclusion, and price-insensitive state investors. The company burns ~3 billion yuan annually with ~6.3-7 billion cash reserves; it needs high valuations to sustain financing for R&D. MiniMax, with comparable technology and revenue but 2.7x lower market cap, faces similar fundamentals but lacks Zhipu's structural advantages. title: 汽车行业装不下蔚小理了
content:
Li Auto's June 15 Livis Day marked a pivotal shift: CEO Li Xiang spent two hours on AI, chips, and embodied intelligence rather than cars. The company unveiled its self-designed Mach M100 chip (5nm, 1280 TOPS), joining NIO's Shenji and XPeng's Turing as the "Wei-Xiao-Li" trio completes their chip strategies.

This isn't merely about cost reduction or supply-chain security. With AI budgets hitting 50% of R&D and organizational restructuring around embodied intelligence, these companies are fundamentally redefining themselves. As vehicles become AI-driven robots where reaction times now exceed human capabilities, chips represent strategic control over next-generation computing platforms—not better automakers, but AI companies that happen to use cars as their current physical shell.

title: 码农连任务都不写了？Codex开始自己给自己派活
content: OpenAI's Codex now features /goal self-generation, where developers provide only high-level intent and the AI writes its own task goals, spawns sub-agents, and manages execution autonomously. This represents a shift from AI-assisted coding to AI-directed task planning. Anthropic and Cursor launched similar multi-agent orchestration features concurrently. While early adopters report 18-hour autonomous runs completing multiple features, concerns remain about token costs spiraling, goal drift, and whether such systems are production-ready. The trend raises questions about programmers' evolving roles as judgment and planning are progressively delegated to AI agents.

title: 受Fable 5封禁影响，GPT-5.6或将延迟发布
content: The US government imposed export controls on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models, citing national security concerns over a jailbreak vulnerability. This marks the first direct US intervention blocking an AI model's release. Anthropic downplayed the issue and noted rival OpenAI's GPT-5.5 has similar capabilities. The ban, triggered after Amazon reported the vulnerability to officials, may delay OpenAI's GPT-5.6, which faces a dilemma: weaker performance cedes narrative control to Anthropic, while stronger performance risks entering the same regulated "danger zone." The case establishes a precedent that advanced AI deployment may require government permission rather than just technical readiness.

title: 兄弟们，我用分屏技巧，让 token 消耗速度降低了一倍！
content: The author reduced token consumption by roughly half using a split-screen technique. Instead of letting context accumulate in one session, they now create a detailed plan first, then open 2-3 separate windows for minor fixes and bug patches. Each fix window is cleared (/clear) after use, while the plan window remains visible for reference. This prevents context from snowballing and wasting tokens before the 5-hour limit expires.

title: 便宜的电车，反而不好卖
content: Cheap electric vehicles are struggling to sell in China despite low prices. Sales of EVs under 80,000 yuan fell nearly 50% from January to April 2026, with micro-EVs dropping 70% year-over-year. The decline stems from reduced purchase tax exemptions and national subsidies that took effect January 1, 2026, significantly raising costs for price-sensitive buyers. Additionally, year-end 2025 demand pre-purchasing and cheaper fuel vehicles further eroded the low-end EV market. Meanwhile, premium EVs above 250,000 yuan continue growing as affluent buyers prioritize technology and quality over minor tax changes, signaling China's shift from price-driven to product-driven competition.

title: 大厂AI，大战618
content:
This year's 618 shopping festival saw AI deeply integrated across e-commerce platforms, shifting focus from traditional discount calculations to AI-driven services. Alibaba's Qianwen, ByteDance's Doubao, and JD's AI digital anchors powered shopping assistance, 24/7 livestreaming, customer service, and logistics optimization.

However, AI's impact remains limited to efficiency gains rather than transforming business models. Consumers generally distrust AI purchasing recommendations and struggle with rigid AI customer service. Merchants benefit from reduced labor costs but face platform dependency and liability concerns.

Platforms are aggressively investing in AI primarily to control consumer decision-making entry points and build ecosystem moats, not just boost short-term sales. While AI's immediate contribution to GMV is modest, experts expect it to become essential infrastructure within two to three years, potentially reshaping e-commerce competitive dynamics.

Token-based communication reduces transaction costs and replaces traditional relationship-building in business. The old model required networking and trust-building through social events; the new model uses verified public data to move directly from idea to delivery. This shift improves trust efficiency and productivity. The author, who predicted declining alcohol-related business entertainment in March 2021, notes the China liquor fund LOF has since fallen 66% from peak, while technology and computing metal stocks have surged dramatically since September 2024.

title: Anthropic 将与特朗普政府就 Mythos 模型争议举行会谈
content: Anthropic is meeting Trump administration officials to resolve a dispute over AI models Fable5 and Mythos5. The company received an export control order Friday citing national security powers, forcing suspension of foreign access to both models. Tensions had already escalated when the Pentagon labeled Anthropic a "supply chain risk" in March, banning defense contractors from using its technology; Anthropic is suing over this. The government requested model disabling Friday afternoon with little prior warning, despite earlier agency cooperation and deployment approval. Anthropic views the conflict as a misunderstanding over potential jailbreak vulnerabilities and seeks to restore access quickly.

title: SpaceX 通过 IPO 筹得约 857 亿美元

The IPO, which priced on June 12, 2026, was heavily oversubscribed, with retail investors submitting over $100 billion in orders and institutions committing at least $10 billion. Major asset managers including BlackRock invested heavily, with BlackRock reportedly committing at least $5 billion.

The complaint targets $200 monthly plans that reportedly proved insufficient for users despite their premium cost.

title: 美官员称美伊已签署电子谅解备忘录，是否意味战争落幕？哪些条款可能会进入最终协议？
content: U.S. and Iranian officials electronically signed a memorandum of understanding providing for immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, lifting of the U.S. blockade, and 60 days of toll-free passage. Details will be released within 24–48 hours; sanctions relief and unfrozen funds depend on Iranian compliance. Iran's parliament speaker negotiated with Supreme Leader authorization. Iran's foreign minister confirmed a formal signing on June 19 in Switzerland, expressing cautious optimism while citing past U.S. unreliability. Israel's withdrawal from Lebanon was not a condition.

title: AI时代，最不值钱的就是“努力”
content:
Li Shanyou argues human civilizations advance through three cognitive stages: sensory (agricultural era, based on spatiotemporal induction), rational (industrial era, based on logical deduction), and "awakened consciousness" (potential future era, accessing Platonic ideals). AI, built on logic, threatens to surpass humans at the rational stage, forcing a necessary leap to the third stage.

He proposes two paths: a "great vow" path for visionaries seeking fundamental breakthroughs (citing DeepSeek's Liang Wenfeng), and a "quality" path for ordinary people—crafting meaningful work with care to gradually elevate consciousness. True entrepreneurship, he contends, serves consciousness evolution rather than wealth alone.

title: 3岁之前跟依恋对象分离，是如何让孩子变得疏离的？ | 原文
content: Early separation from primary caregivers before age three can lead to emotional detachment in children. A study observing 15-30 month-old infants found that children with secure attachments who were suddenly placed in unfamiliar environments with unfamiliar caregivers—such as hospitals without parents or full-time daycare—showed significant distress and became emotionally withdrawn. The research suggests maintaining consistent caregiver presence during this critical developmental period to preserve healthy attachment bonds.

title: GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Overview of common slash commands
content: GitHub Copilot CLI uses slash commands as built-in controls for managing the AI assistant directly from the terminal. Key commands include /model to switch between AI models with different capabilities and costs; /context and /compact to monitor and manage token usage within the context window; /resume to access previous sessions; /diff to review recent changes; /cwd to switch working directories across repositories; and /reset-allowed-tools to manage file editing permissions. Typing / displays all available commands.

title: Accelerating researchers and developers building multilingual AI with a new open dataset
content: GitHub released the GitHub Multilingual Repositories Dataset, a CC0-1.0 metadata dataset identifying non-English content across over 40 million repositories. It classifies READMEs, issues, and pull requests using three language detectors with confidence scores, revealing patterns like Korean dominating issues and Portuguese leading READMEs. The dataset helps researchers discover multilingual repositories, study developer communities, and build more inclusive AI tools, addressing underrepresentation of European and other languages in AI training data.

Two major Chinese memory chipmakers, CXMT and YMTC, are planning IPOs on the A-share market. Their listings could reshape investment patterns by introducing large-cap hard-tech assets that the market currently lacks. Historically, A-share investors favored small-cap stocks due to retail trader dominance and few globally competitive mega-cap tech companies. These DRAM and 3D NAND leaders may fill this gap, with projected combined valuations reaching trillions of yuan, supported by AI-driven demand and improving earnings predictability.
